find.match_belief: The best spaces don't forgive sloppiness. They refuse to.

profile.belief: Constraints are the brief. Respect the brief and everything you make has teeth.
profile.working_on: Designing visual systems for nonprofits where shrinking color budgets force every hue to earn its place.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a passion for creativity that thrives within limitations, transforming constraints into powerful, meaningful visual narratives.
